indication: BESPONSA (inotuzumab ozogamicin for injection) is indicated for monotherapy for the treatment of adults with relapsed or refractory CD22-positive B-cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL).
description: Health Canada approved inotuzumab ozogamicin as monotherapy for the treatment of adults with relapsed or refractory CD22-positive B-cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL).

document.name: Besponsa (inotuzumab ozogamicin) [product monograph]. HC.
